pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1215)

output.summary: Parallel Muon parameter banking with depth-scaled LN and LeakyReLU² MLP3× feeds legal score-first TTT using sliding-window scoring before SGD.
techniques: Parallel Muon parameter banking with batched Newton-Schulz optimizer
Depth-dependent LN scaling driving LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP3× blocks
Legal score-first TTT: sliding-window scoring per chunk followed by SGD fine-tuning
